title: AI's Problems Solved — Ethical Web AI
description: Generative AI has ignored data protection and has no working monetisation model. Here's how AI Vault and the Ethical Web Search platform fix both.

blocks.text: The biggest problem Generative AI has right now is data protection

items.title: Generative AI has completely ignored the lack of data protection
27% of all companies (mainly large ones) will not use Gen. AI because of this risk
AI Vault is the only turn-key solution to this problem, and it is patent-protected

blocks.text: The biggest problem Generative AI has in the future is how it can be monetised

items.title: Sam Altman has been red-flagged on how OpenAI is going to justify its valuation
OpenAI is looking for Erotica to monetise ChatGPT
Advertising will not work with Generative AI
